content.text:
Based on the zoomed-in view, I can clearly see the structure of atom C:0 and its bonded neighbours.

## Analysis

Atom **C:0** (the central golden sphere in the center-right of the zoomed image) is covalently connected to:

| Atomic Index | Element |
|-------------|---------|
| 1 | C |
| 24 | H |
| 25 | H |
| 26 | H |

**geomconf_index: 619**

The atom C:0 is the terminal carbon of a methyl group (CH3), bonded to one carbon atom (C:1) and three hydrogen atoms (H:24, H:25, H:26). The C:1 atom is further connected to O:4, forming part of a methoxy group (-OCH3) attached to the larger molecular structure.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 0, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
